title: Nectarine Tart
description: A sweet and flaky pastry tart filled with caramelized nectarines, perfect for a warm dessert.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a small bowl, mix together sugar and almond extract.
Arrange the sliced nectarines on the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the nectarines, pressing gently to seal.
Prick the bottom of the pastry with a fork to prevent it from bubbling up during baking.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Dust the tart with confectioners sugar before serving.
